The reset, in everyday rituals

We’ve all felt fogged.fogd. is the reset.

The idea

Small rituals create space for reset.

We’ve all experienced it — the pressure, the noise, the constant distraction of modern life. A feeling of being mentally fogged, overwhelmed and disconnected.

fogd. was created as a response: a reset built through simple, everyday rituals — what you wear, how you move, how you pause, and how you create space.

reset. realign. return.
The philosophy

Reset.Realign.Return.

Reset is not one big moment. It’s something we return to with intention — the run, the walk, the quiet coffee, the pause before reacting.

fogd. is made for real life, not perfect stories. Wear it your way, and come back to calm as often as you need.

Real moments. Real reset.

The ritual, in sound.

Every Aura Ritual pairs with a free guided meditation from Niki — light a cone, press play, and reset. Scan the QR on your box to return here anytime.

The culture of reset

Reset is something we return to.

A run. A walk. A quiet coffee. A moment of scent. A line in a journal. A pause before reacting.

Real moments. Real reset.

What fogged you?

What helped you reset?

What are you returning to?

Where fogd. began

One honest idea, late at night.

fogd. started late at night in Jaipur — two founders working through ideas. Cones, clothing, natural fabrics: different products, but one shared feeling.

We weren’t trying to build another fashion label. We were bringing it all together into one honest idea — and kept returning to the same truth. We’ve all felt fogged. fogd. is the reset.

Jaipur, India · January 2026
